calendar.matters:
Petition For Instruction To Confirm Assets Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Rudy Chew (Trustee).

Mr. Koplowitz stated that there were only three heirs, that there was a separate trust for the brother, and that one sister was not under the trust but they have reached an agreement. The Court granted the petition (signing the "Order Confirming Right To Trust Property" in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
